content:
Manual Testing Project: Requirement Document
Project Title: Zero Bank â€“ Online Banking Application
Website: http://zero.webappsecurity.com/
Tester: Tanay Puranik
Date: 19/7/25
1. Project Overview
Zero Bank is a demo online banking application that simulates the basic functionalities of a banking system. The goal is to test the user experience, data validation, and functionality of the key features available to users.
2. Scope of Testing
The following modules will be tested manually:
ï‚· Login
ï‚· Account Summary
ï‚· Transfer Funds
ï‚· Feedback Form
ï‚· Logout
3. Functional Requirements
ًں”گ Module 1: Login
ï‚· System must allow users to login with valid credentials.
ï‚· Invalid login attempts should show proper error messages.
ï‚· "Forgot your password" should redirect properly.
ًں“ٹ Module 2: Account Summary
ï‚· User must see current account balances.
ï‚· Different account types must display (Checking, Savings, etc.).
ًں”پ Module 3: Transfer Funds
ï‚· Allow transfer from one account to another.
ï‚· Validate negative and empty values.
ï‚· Show success message upon valid transfer.
ًں“© Module 4: Feedback Form
ï‚· Should allow users to submit feedback.
ï‚· Fields: Name, Email, Subject, Comment.
ï‚· Form validations must be in place.
ًںڑھ Module 5: Logout
ï‚· Clicking "Logout" should end the session.
ï‚· User must be redirected to login page after logout.
4. Non-Functional Requirements
ï‚· Website should be accessible on Chrome and Firefox.
ï‚· All pages should load within 3 seconds.
ï‚· Mobile compatibility testing (optional).
5. Assumptions
ï‚· The site is a demo and will not save data.
ï‚· Valid login credentials are public: username: username, password: password.
6. Tools Used
ï‚· Manual Testing
ï‚· Excel (for test cases and reports)
ï‚· JIRA (for tracking bugs, stories, and progress)
